slides.text: The ChatGPT prompt that reads you like a book
slides.sub: One prompt. It will describe you better than your friends can.

"Based on everything you know about me from our chats, act as a psychologist. Tell me the patterns you see in how I think, what probably drives me, and one blind spot I have. Be specific, not flattering."
It pattern-matches across everything you've ever asked it. The more you've used ChatGPT, the scarier accurate this gets.

slides.text: Fair warning: it WILL call you out
slides.sub: The 'be specific, not flattering' part is what makes it honest instead of a horoscope. Rate yours 1 to 10 in the comments.
Follow @techyai_cj. one AI drop like this every week.
